zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Countess Of Dornberg於大約1268年出生在德國貝也奧培爾巴也爾時，她的父親Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV32歲，母親Richenza Von Ortenberg27歲。她於1288年9月3日之前與Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年享年42歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯哈布格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Countess Of Dornberg于大约1268年出生在德国貝也奧培爾巴也爾时，她的父亲Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV32岁，母亲Richenza Von Ortenberg27岁。她于1288年9月3日之前与Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年享年42岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯哈布格。

nameMeanings.name: Dornberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nels, Thor.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Countess Of Dornberg was born about 1268, in Oberbayern, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV, was 32 and her mother, Richenza Von Ortenberg, was 27. She married Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen before 3 September 1288. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1309, at the age of 42, and was buried in Harburg, Donau-Ries, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Countess Of Dornberg est née environ 1268, à Oberbayern, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Richenza Von Ortenberg, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen avant 3 septembre 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1309, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Harburg, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Countess Of Dornberg um 1268 in Oberbayern, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV 32 und ihre Mutter Richenza Von Ortenberg 27. Sie hat vor 3. September 1288 Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1309 im Alter von 42 Jahren und wurde in Harburg, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Countess Of Dornberg è nata il circa 1268 nel Oberbayern, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Richenza Von Ortenberg, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen prima del 3 settembre 1288. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1309, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a Harburg, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Countess Of Dornbergが約1268年にドイツバイエルンオバーバイエルンで生まれた時，父Wolfram Von Dörnberg IVは32歳，母Richenza Von Ortenbergは27歳であった。1288年9月3日以前にLudwig VII. Graf von Oettingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年に42歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ドナウ-リーズハーブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.Dörnberg bei Erharting, Rohrbach, Bayern: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 uh도르프 아 이 에하틴그 로h르바치
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Countess Of Dornberg(이)가 대략 1268년 독일 베이른 오버베이른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richenza Von Ortenberg(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1288년 9월 3일 이전 Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 도나-리스 하르버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Countess Of Dornberg nasceu aproximadamente 1268, em Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Richenza Von Ortenberg, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen antes 3 de setembro de 1288. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1309, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Harburg, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Countess Of Dornberg родилась около 1268 г. в местности обирбеиирн, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Richenza Von Ortenberg, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen перед 3 сентябрь 1288 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1309 г. в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности харбург, ландкрис донау-риесь, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Countess Of Dornberg nació aproximadamente 1268, en Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Wolfram Von Dörnberg IV, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Richenza Von Ortenberg, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ludwig VII. Graf von Oettingen antes de 3 de septiembre de 1288. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1309, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en Harburg, Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Alemania.
